title: LiveTextureSwap
description: Live texture & model swapping for items and armor — directly in-game
body:
# 🔁 LiveTextureSwap — Change Textures and Models Live In-Game

**LiveTextureSwap** is a client-side mod for Minecraft Java Edition that allows you to **change item and armor textures and models in real time**, without reloading the world, without F3+T, and without interrupting gameplay.

You can upload a texture or a full model while playing, apply it to an item or armor piece, and see the result **directly in-game within seconds**.

---

## ✨ Features

* ⚡ Instant replacement of **item and armor textures**
* 🧩 Support for **2D and 3D** textures and models
* 🚫 No resource reloads, no world reloads
* 📂 Upload files directly from inside the game
* 🖥️ Clean and user-friendly in-game interface
* 📦 Export all added textures and models into a full resource pack

---

## 🎨 Texture Replacement Modes

When applying a texture, you can choose one of three modes:

### 🖼️ PNG Mode

Simple texture replacement using a PNG image.
Perfect for quick reskins, custom icons, and fast visual changes.

---

### 🧱 JSON Mode

Replace an item with a **full custom model**, including:

* JSON model files
* PNG textures
* `.properties` files

This allows you to use fully custom 3D item models **without restarting the game**.

---

### 🛡️ ARM Mode

Replace textures of **armor worn by the player**.
Changes are immediately visible:

* on the player model
* in third-person view
* in the world

---

## 🗂️ Texture Management

* View a list of all added textures and models
* Quickly switch between different variants
* Remove textures or revert to vanilla
* Organize textures by item

---

## 📦 Resource Pack Export

LiveTextureSwap can combine **all added textures and models** into a single resource pack:

* Export as a ready-to-use `.zip`
* Share it with friends
* Use it in other worlds or modpacks

This makes the mod useful not only for live customization, but also as a **resource pack creation tool**.

---

## 👥 Who Is This Mod For?

* 🎥 Content creators (YouTube, Shorts, TikTok)
* 🏗️ Builders and designers
* ⚔️ PvP players with custom visuals
* 🎨 Resource pack creators
* 🎮 Players who want fast and flexible visual customization

---

## ⚙️ Compatibility

* Minecraft Java Edition **1.20+**
* **Fabric**
* Compatible with Sodium and Iris
* Works alongside regular resource packs
* OptiFine is not guaranteed to be compatible

🔒 **Client-side only** — no server installation required.

---

## ⚠️ Limitations

* Visual changes only
* Does not affect item stats or gameplay
* No automatic texture synchronization between players
  (use resource pack export to share)

---

## 🚀 Why LiveTextureSwap?

LiveTextureSwap removes the biggest barrier to customization in Minecraft — constant reloads.

You can change how your items and armor look **as fast as switching a hotbar slot**.
